nativeSnippet: ({ ...currentExtras, schemaId: annotation.schemaId, identifier: annotation.identifier, title: annotation.title })
note: Record spread-merge of a generic Extras record with three literal annotation fields, immediately cast to IdentityAnnotationResult<...>. canImportUtils=false so any replacement is raw effect/Struct. The generic Extras type parameter is load-bearing and the result is a manual cast; rewriting to Struct ops risks losing the inferred shape. Human should confirm whether a Struct merge preserves the generic type before remediating.
